severity_rationale: Reproducible unhandled server exceptions (HTTP 500 with 'exception: Server Error' body) on 6 state-changing POST endpoints with authenticated but unprivileged account. Reveals missing structured validation layer and provides oracle for field enumeration. No PII leak. Standalone P4.
validation_method: Curl — 6 endpoints consistently 500 with identical JSON body shape.
response_summary: Consistent HTTP 500 with JSON body {"status": 500, "exception": "Server Error"} instead of a structured validation error. No stack leak but oracle on missing-field enumeration.
impact: Attacker can blindly enumerate required request fields on state-changing endpoints via 500-vs-200 differential. Indicates absence of input-validation middleware on at least 6 endpoints.
remediation: Add structured input validation returning 400 with field-level error descriptions; catch exceptions in middleware and return sanitized 4xx.
